case_title: COMMERCIAL COLLECTIONS OF AMERICA, LLC VS. LIGHTWAVE, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-03-2018 CONTINUED TO DEC-04-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100039573) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
NON SERVICE REPORT (TRANSACTION ID # 100039573) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMERCIAL COLLECTIONS OF AMERICA, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LIGHTWAVE, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMMERCIAL COLLECTIONS OF AMERICA, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIGHTWAVE, INC. $5,107.50 PRINCIPAL, $850.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,691.63 INTEREST, $405.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,055.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100039573)
